rationale: Slide 3 has a visible hard-fail: a placeholder empty mint box, a blue bar and a duplicated black 'Contact audit' pill that collide and bleed off the left slide edge, violating margin, alignment, and completion criteria. Slides 1 and 2 are clean, but a single deterministic hard-fail on slide 3 fails the gate.
